seo.metaTitle: White-Label AI Website Builder for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Launch AI-powered websites under your brand. Hostopia's Online Presence Builder helps telcos, ISPs, and MSPs activate SMBs and scale digital revenue.

hero.headline: AI-Powered Websites Under Your Brand — Launched in Minutes, Not Months
hero.subheadline: Most SMBs don't fail online because they can't afford a website. They fail because building one feels too complex. OPB removes that friction entirely.
hero.description: Your SMB customers describe their business, and AI generates a professional, mobile-ready website — complete with copy, imagery, and layout — ready to publish. Your brand stays at the center of the entire experience.
hero.badge: AI-powered websites & hosting, powered by Hostopia

sidebar.heading: With OPB, your SMB customers can

items.title: Launch in minutes
items.body: AI generates a complete, multi-page site with industry-relevant copy, imagery, and layout from just a business name and category.

image.alt: Website analytics and fast launch dashboard

items.title: Create without skills
items.body: Built-in AI writing and image generation means no copywriter or photographer needed.

items.title: Convert visitors
items.body: Forms, maps, galleries, and calls-to-action come standard — sites that generate business, not just digital brochures.

items.title: Manage everything in one place
items.body: Website, domain, email, and services from one intuitive, partner-branded dashboard.

heroImage.alt: Modern website builder and design on a laptop

features.heading: Everything Your SMBs Need — Under Your Brand
features.intro: OPB runs fully white-label — your logo, your URL, your customer portal. Hostopia is invisible.

cards.title: AI Site Generation
cards.body: Customers input their business details. OPB generates a complete, multi-page website with copy, imagery, layout, maps, and contact forms in under five minutes.

cards.title: Drag-and-Drop Editor
cards.body: Responsive themes, vertical-specific templates, and pre-built content blocks for hero sections, galleries, FAQs, testimonials, and contact pages.

cards.title: Built-In Conversion Tools
cards.body: Lead capture forms, Google Maps, social widgets, and clear CTAs come standard. One-click Online Store activation for ecommerce expansion.

cards.title: Integrated Hosting & Platform
cards.body: Reliable, scalable hosting included. Unlimited pages, per-page SEO settings, Google Analytics, and centralized management through your branded dashboard.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Built for Service Providers. Not Bolted On.
partnerAdvantage.intro: OPB turns website services from a support-heavy cost center into a scalable, AI-driven revenue engine.

items.title: Activate more of your base
items.body: AI-driven onboarding means customers who previously abandoned DIY tools now actually finish and publish. Higher activation rates translate directly to more paying subscribers.

items.title: Grow revenue per customer
items.body: Websites are the entry point. Once live on OPB, the path to ecommerce, SEO, listings, and email marketing is a natural conversation — not a cold pitch.

items.title: Reduce operational drag
items.body: No web development team required. No infrastructure to maintain. AI handles it for your customers, automated provisioning handles it for your ops team.

items.title: Differentiate from commodity providers
items.body: An AI-powered, branded website platform integrated into your existing services and billing sets you apart from standalone builders and low-cost hosting.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Foundation of Your Digital Services Portfolio
lifecycleFit.intro: OPB sits at the center of your 'Get Online' motion — the entry point that pulls the rest of your digital portfolio through.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Domains, logo, and professional email establish the SMB identity.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: AI-powered websites and hosting launch in minutes under your brand.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility and trust.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and custom development fuel growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position OPB as the default website offering for new connectivity customers, the modern upgrade path for hosting-only accounts, and the foundation for ecommerce and digital marketing expansion.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn AI-Powered Websites into a Growth Engine?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch Online Presence Builder under your brand, activate more SMB customers, and build the digital foundation that drives long-term revenue across your portfolio.
